Container.Name: unstuckarr
Container.Overview: Automatically detects and removes stuck downloads from Sonarr/Radarr when using RDT-client with Real-Debrid. Features a web UI with live logs, download history, configurable detection thresholds, a strike system, and Apprise notification support (Discord, Telegram, Ntfy, and 80+ more). No environment variables required — everything is configured via the Settings UI after first start.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: sonarr radarr rdt-client real-debrid stuck downloads cleanup arr queue

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Unstuckarr web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database. All settings (including connection config) are stored here.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your timezone (e.g. Europe/Amsterdam, America/New_York). Used for log timestamps.
